current_tasks: Latest remote-pushed/CI-green baseline remains 4e02e548 `refactor(homestead): scope surface context providers` unless pushed later. Local branch should be ahead of origin/develop by 26 after this handoff commit, or ahead 25 before it.
New commits after prior handoff: 9688782f `feat(ds): promote studio visual primitives`; 273712f4 `feat(homestead): share reactive element lifecycle`; 99144678 `docs(ui): record primitive promotions`.

9688782f promoted repeated app/dev visual patterns into `@refarm.dev/ds`: `.refarm-eyebrow-chip`, `.refarm-card-roomy`, `.refarm-workbench-actions`, `.refarm-workbench-card`, `.refarm-muted-list`, `.refarm-proof-list`, `.refarm-split-grid`, `.refarm-data-table`, `.refarm-loading-state`, `.refarm-spinner`. It updated `packages/ds/README.md`, `apps/dev/src/pages/index.astro`, `streams.astro`, `surfaces.astro`, and `surface-ledger.ts` to consume these DS primitives. This reduced app-local CSS while keeping app copy/routes/fixtures local.

273712f4 added Homestead shared live-island lifecycle primitive in `packages/homestead/src/sdk/custom-element.ts`: `HomesteadReactiveElementController`, `HomesteadReactiveElement`, `HomesteadReactiveElementDefinition`, `defineHomesteadReactiveElement(...)`, and `connectHomesteadReactiveElement(...)`. Exported via `packages/homestead/src/sdk/index.ts` and package subpath `@refarm.dev/homestead/sdk/custom-element`. `apps/dev/tsconfig.json` maps this subpath to source. `surface-ledger.ts` and `surface-inspector.ts` now use the Homestead helper instead of duplicating custom element lifecycle/controller bookkeeping.

99144678 documented the promotions in `docs/UI_ARCHITECTURE.md` and `packages/homestead/README.md`: apps/dev incubates; DS owns repeated visual primitives; Homestead owns semantic/runtime lifecycle helpers; apps keep host behavior/copy/fixtures.
